title: Reasoning blocks in a turn emit aep.reasoning_emitted with text + signature, ordered before text_emitted
description: When a model turn contains reasoning/thinking blocks (Anthropic extended thinking, OpenAI o-series reasoning, etc.), the runner MUST emit one aep.reasoning_emitted event per block carrying aep.reasoning.text and (if the provider gives one) aep.reasoning.signature. The events MUST come AFTER aep.model_turn_ended and BEFORE aep.text_emitted — the wire reconstructs as 'thought, then spoke'. Distinct from text_emitted so consumers can collapse / redact chain-of-thought from displays without losing it from the audit log.
